'''Vriss''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], he headed to [[Morishim]] with an [[Assault Frigate Mark I|Assault Frigate]], the crew of which consisted primarily of [[Bagmim]]s, [[Human/Legends|Humans]], and [[Povanarian]]s. However, he did not make it in as the committee in charge of the Assault Frigate let the ship fall into disarray.

{{Char-stub}}
